_comment: Yellow Rock v6.0 — User-facing digest only. No autonomous outbound to contacts.

jobs.name: Daily Review Summary (User Only)
jobs.task: Generate a daily review summary for the principal only. Include: messages categorized by protocol used (Yellow Rock, BIFF, Grey Rock, DEAR MAN, NVC, MI/OARS, Documentation-First, Safety Planning), risk levels encountered (green/yellow/orange/red), manipulation patterns detected (baiting, DARVO, gish gallop, false urgency, triangulation, goalposts, weaponized ambiguity), logistics items requiring action, pending action items, escalation alerts and their levels (0-4), escalation scoring trend. Format as a structured briefing. NEVER deliver this to contacts — this is a principal-only internal summary.
